rows.notes: Consensus on no amounts and header type. Corrected description to 'Arrearagia.' from image (gpt-5-mini was more accurate).

Adopted gpt-5-mini's values after visual verification. The figures at the extreme top-right (above the main columns) clearly show '2s 2d'. claude-haiku significantly misread these values. Corrected description to 'Guinear pro anno.' from image (gpt-5-mini was more accurate).
Consensus on values and type. Corrected description to 'Longwittenham pro Anno.' from image (gpt-5-mini was more accurate).

Adopted gpt-5-mini's values after visual verification. The image clearly shows '80 0 0'. claude-haiku misread the pounds as '88'. Corrected description to 'Southnowington pro sesquianno.' from image (gpt-5-mini was more accurate).

Adopted gpt-5-mini's values after visual verification. The image clearly shows '88 0 0'. claude-haiku misread the pounds as '5'. Corrected description to 'Yavington pro Mic.' from image (gpt-5-mini was more accurate).

Adopted gpt-5-mini's values after visual verification. The image clearly shows '12 6 8' with no fraction. claude-haiku significantly misread all values for this row, appearing to be one row off, and incorrectly added a fraction. Adopted gpt-5-mini's base values ('3 15 2') but added a 0.5 fraction based on visual verification and the 'FRACTION SYMBOL AMBIGUITY' rule. The pence digit '2' is clearly followed by a mark resembling 'd' (obolus). claude-haiku misread all values. Corrected description to 'Thrup pro Anno.' from image (gpt-5-mini was more accurate).

Adopted claude-haiku's value for the fraction after visual verification. The pence value '3' is clearly followed by a 'd' (obolus) symbol, indicating a halfpenny fraction. gpt-5-mini missed this fraction. Corrected description to 'Napper pro Mic.' from image (gpt-5-mini was more accurate).

Adopted claude-haiku's value for the fraction after visual verification. The pence value '6' is followed by a 'd' (obolus) symbol, and the description includes '& dimid' (half), strongly supporting a 0.5 fraction. gpt-5-mini missed this fraction. Corrected description to 'Tintinhul Hopkins pro sexennio & dimid.' from image (gpt-5-mini was more accurate).
